DOT/FMCSA Compliance API
DocsAPI ReferencePricing

Pricing

Straightforward. No surprise fees.

Free

$0

  • 100 calls/month
  • All tools
  • Community support

Growth

$79/month

  • 10,000 API calls/month
  • All tools
  • Email support

Business

$299/month

  • 100,000 API calls/month
  • All tools
  • Priority support

Pay-per-call

$0.01 per API call — no subscription. Volume discounts for 1M+ calls/month.

Read the Docs

DOT/FMCSA Compliance API — Built with plain-English summaries from official 49 CFR data.

Data current as of April 2026. Not legal advice.
